children.text: Dear classmates, we're going to leave our primary school soon and start middle school this September.
children.cn: 亲爱的同学们，我们很快就要离开小学，在今年九月开始上中学了。
children.notes: leave 离开；middle school 中学；September 九月
children.statement: The children are starting middle school in August.

children.notes: excited 兴奋的；sad 悲伤的
children.explanation: 玲玲感到 excited 且 sad。

children.text: I'm excited because we're going to study Chinese, English, Maths, History, Geography, and learn lots of new things.
children.cn: 我很兴奋，因为我们要学习语文、英语、数学、历史、地理，还要学习很多新事物。
children.statement: They are going to study many subjects.
children.explanation: 文中列举了语文、英语、数学等多门学科。

children.text: We're also going to meet new friends there.
children.cn: 我们还将在那里结识新朋友。
children.notes: meet new friends 结识新朋友
children.statement: They won't meet any new people.
children.explanation: 玲玲说会 meet new friends (结识新朋友)。

children.text: At the same time, I'm very sad to say goodbye to you.
children.cn: 同时，我很伤心要和你们说再见。
children.notes: at the same time 同时
children.statement: Lingling is happy to say goodbye.
children.explanation: 玲玲说感到 very sad (非常伤心)。

children.text: My best friends Sam and Amy are going back to the UK.
children.cn: 我最好的朋友萨姆和埃米要回英国了。
children.statement: Sam and Amy are staying in China.
children.explanation: 他们要回英国 (back to the UK)。

children.text: My dear friends, I'll miss you all. Let's write lots of emails to each other!
children.cn: 我亲爱的朋友们，我会想念你们所有人的。让我们互相写很多邮件吧！
children.notes: miss 想念；each other 互相
children.statement: They will keep in touch by email.
children.explanation: 玲玲提议 write lots of emails to each other (互相写很多邮件)。
